gaps.description: 2026-05-02 code verification: `/warehouse/batches` route and BatchManagement page exist, but `client/src/views/Layout.vue` visible warehouse menu only exposes `/warehouse/materials` and `/warehouse/suppliers`; no visible batch-management entry was found. Plan written 2026-05-03.
validationCommands: cd client && npx vitest run src/views/__tests__/Layout.spec.ts

gaps.description: 2026-05-02 code verification: server exposes `GET /warehouse/batches/fifo` via BatchController.getFIFO and BatchService.getFIFO, but RequisitionList creates/completes requisitions without material/batch selection or FIFO recommendation, and `batchApi` has no getFIFO wrapper. Requirement is clear enough for a plan. No schema change; BR-308 is planned via addItemsByFifo merge-on-write for existing requisitionId + batchId rows.

validationCommands: npm run test:e2e -w client -- --grep GAP-203 (if no GAP-203 E2E exists, do not install pnpm; report substitute checks)
npm run test:e2e -w client -- --grep GAP-204 (if no GAP-204 E2E exists, report substitute checks; do not use pnpm)

gaps.description: 2026-05-02 code verification: StagingAreaStocktake submission exists, but MixingService.createExecution only validates recipe, staging stock, material match and quantity; it does not check same-day shift stocktake status before creating MixingExecution. Requirement is clear enough for a plan.

gaps.description: 2026-05-02 code verification: RecordTemplateDesigner uses recordTemplateApi.updateFields and the backend validates `{ fields }` on `PUT /record-templates/:id/fields`, but the still-routed TemplateEdit page saves to `/templates/:id` with `{ title, fields }` while UpdateRecordTemplateDto expects `name` and `fieldsJson`. Requirement is clear enough for a plan.

2026-05-02 code verification: AuditPlanController has exact `GET /audit/plans/:id`; AuditExecutionController has exact `GET /audit/plans/:id/progress`. Nest/Express route matching does not let `:id` consume the extra `/progress` segment, so the suspected prefix collision is not an actual implementation gap.

2026-05-02 code verification: `User.role` is deprecated in Prisma, but string role checks remain in permission/roles guards, record-task, task, document, export, recycle-bin and related modules. Requirement is clear enough for a plan.

2026-05-02 code verification: PermissionAuditLog.vue calls `/permission-audit-logs` and `/permission-audit-logs/export`; PermissionAuditLogController exposes both endpoints and OperationLogModule is imported by AppModule. Existing component tests assert the same endpoint calls.
